case_title: COTTON, ROBERT PAUL; VS YAMAGUCHI, MICHAEL J.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,500.00 FILED BY COTTON, ROBERT PAUL; AS TO DEFENDANT YAMAGUCHI, MICHAEL J. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-11-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
